reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of AI search and benchmarks, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links conjecture-generation, ontology-lock-in, and hindsight-curated benchmarks into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Claims about narrowing-first architectures missing ontology-shifting discoveries are testable, though knowledge-creation remains partly ambiguous.
explanation: AI may generate strong conjectures yet miss true knowledge when benchmarks reward historically curated, frame-bound search.
